title: centaurea vochinensis var. major
intro: Centaurea vochinensis var. major, also known as the Greater Centaury, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to its bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Centaurea vochinensis var. major can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, making it a versatile remedy for various health concerns.
